name: mimo-coder-studio
description: A simple desktop chat app for MiMo Code.

scripts.build: vue-tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
scripts.build:dir: vue-tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:win: vue-tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: vue-tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: vue-tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --linux
